_comment: RI Canon Opportunity: Blood Ancestor Battle. Canon event: Wang Lin kills the Blood Ancestor (Yao Xinghai). Per user directive: every canon event must be accessible in-game.
name: Blood Ancestor Battle
canon_event: Wang Lin kills the Blood Ancestor (Yao Xinghai)
why_untaken: Requires Spirit Severing+ to survive the blood sea; the Blood Ancestor can reform.
natural_next_event: The Blood Ancestor's corpse-sea remains; blood beasts converge.

karmic_weight.description: No specific karmic consequence recorded in canon
